input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.2.6
            TITLE: all harness hardware must be used as received from the manufacturer.  no modification

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.2.6: All Harness hardware must be used as received from the manufacturer.  No modification
T.2.2.6 All Harness hardware must be used as received from the manufacturer.  No modification 
(including drilling, cutting, grinding, etc) is permitted.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 59 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: All Harness hardware must be used as received from the manufacturer. No modification (including drilling, cutting, grinding, etc) is permitted.
